title: McCarthy Tétrault Bolsters M&A Group in Montréal with New Partner Anne-Marie Panzini
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Bolsters M&A Group in Montréal with New Partner Anne-Marie Panzini
We are pleased to welcome Anne‑Marie Panzini to the Firm as a Partner in our M&A Group in Montréal.
Anne‑Marie brings significant transactional experience across domestic and cross‑border M&A, private equity and venture capital. She advises Canadian and international corporations, strategic buyers and sellers, private equity sponsors and emerging companies on a wide range of mandates, including complex transactions in the technology, life sciences, infrastructure and consumer sectors. Her work with high‑growth companies and investors further deepens the Firm’s ability to support clients across evolving and fast‑moving markets.
Anne‑Marie has also gained meaningful experience in New York, where she advised on U.S. and international mandates and worked closely with cross‑border teams. Clients value her commercial judgment, her practical and solutions‑driven approach and her ability to bring clarity and coordination to sophisticated transactional work.
“We are excited to welcome Anne‑Marie to the Firm. She brings a strong track record in M&A and private equity work, and her experience advising high‑growth companies adds valuable insight to our national platform,” said Richard O’Doherty , Partner and Co‑Leader of the Business Law Group.
“Anne‑Marie’s cross‑border experience and practical, business‑focused perspective will be a significant asset to clients navigating complex transactional opportunities,” said Matt Cumming , Partner and Co‑Leader of the Business Law Group.
Anne‑Marie’s addition reinforces the Firm’s continued investment in our market‑leading M&A Group, anchored by an integrated platform that brings together top transactional talent and leading industry expertise, to support clients on sophisticated domestic and cross‑border mandates.
“I am thrilled to be joining McCarthy Tétrault. The Firm’s collaborative culture, national reach and focus on delivering practical, strategic solutions create an exceptional environment to deliver seamless service for our clients. I look forward to contributing to the team and supporting clients across Canada and internationally,” Anne‑Marie said.
With experience across industries that are central to the Canadian and global business landscape, McCarthy Tétrault’s National M&A Group advises on the transactions that are most critical to our clients’ businesses, regularly acting on complex domestic and cross-border mandates involving mergers, acquisitions, divestitures, joint ventures, and strategic partnerships. Clients benefit from our industry-informed perspective and our ability to deliver practical, commercially focused advice, regardless of deal size or complexity. Our team acts for public and private companies, financial sponsors, and other market participants, drawing on a fully integrated, national platform to help clients achieve their transaction objectives. Learn how our team can help you.

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact: media@mccarthy.ca
- Anne-Marie Panzini Partner People.Offices.Singular Montréal
